title: ipomoea neglecta
intro: Ipomoea neglecta, also known as Japanese morning glory or Mexican morning glory, is a type of flowering vine native to Mexico and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antitussive effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ipomoea neglecta include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, cough, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea neglecta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
